In recent NYC news, seven cold exposure deaths were reported, a plane crashed into the Hudson River, and PATH service was suspended due to power issues, while Mayor Mamdani faced scrutiny over housing vouchers and announced a lawsuit against predatory tow truck operators.

### Risks & Alerts

- Mamdani administration reports 7 additional cold exposure deaths in NYC homes. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQMUZNVTliXzBrWnVzbUJzZHJITEdqRWFLOE1GcVNKTmc0b3lzOTZzRUhaSXNYT3ZkSGlKaDVHLXR4bVFUVjk1REJiMmlVUEt5NGdET3NCSzRiT09DaEItVkdPRjYyWkZBaVFPcVhuY2hXRHhGeVplQjdoeHJtQThVcFZVSHhLd0hXMUxMMlJ5cTlfNnluMVBNNV9SN0h2MURjQlRCQUdCT00xaWRWRk1mUQ?oc=5)
- Plane departing New York crashed into the freezing Hudson River; details emerging. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- PATH service suspended between Hoboken and 33rd Street due to ongoing power issues. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipgFBVV95cUxPUnBqS3Vrc0hudUNmaTA2ck9UOGFFVGhKQzBlbXl2WnMxeTNudk81YmpHRWV4LXVYTjFCSUQ4U3FCVEFoSlVpU3J5TF84NldkUnRzdi1MWkxtZ3dwcW80VVg1MDNPUjQ4M0FRXzhfVHdhbEZSeGNfZkV6TWFYd0tuenJLMlRKMWUzMFpFS0M2OEdXd3JzVXN0aWZjR2lnSW9Sa2wzSGZB?oc=5)
- Consumers warned to be vigilant against potential price gouging on essential items. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
